label: Raydium CLMM range watch
description: Poll a Raydium CLMM pool's current tick and compare to your position's tick range. The step **completes** when the current tick moves **outside** the position range (i.e. concentrated liquidity is no longer active). Save the drift direction ('above' or 'below') to a variable for downstream branching. Use in always-on workflows to trigger rebalancing or exit logic.

inputs.description: Raydium CLMM pool ID. Template vars supported: {{poolId}}.
Position NFT mint. Template vars supported: {{clmmPositionNft}}.
How often to check the current tick (default 30s).
Maximum wait time (0 = wait forever until out of range).

outputs.description: Row variable: 'above' (tick rose past tickUpper) or 'below' (tick fell past tickLower).
Row variable: current tick index at the time drift was detected.
Row variable: JSON with tickLower, tickUpper, currentTick, direction.

formSchema.label: Position NFT mint
formSchema.hint: The CLMM position NFT. Use a variable from a previous open-position step.
